questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно использует "as soon as" с правильным временем глагола в придаточном?

choices.text: As soon as she will arrive, we start.
As soon as she arrives, we'll start.
As soon as she arrived, we start.
As soon as she arrives, we start.

questions.explanation: В придаточном предложении после "as soon as" используется Present Simple, а главное предложение — Future Simple.

questions.prompt: Выберите правильное предложение с "as soon as".

choices.text: As soon as you finish your meal, you will go out.
As soon as you will finish your meal, you go out.
As soon as you finished your meal, you will go out.
As soon as you finish your meal, you go out.

questions.explanation: В придаточном предложении используется Present Simple, а главная часть — Future Simple.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение содержит ошибку в использовании "as soon as"?

choices.text: As soon as the sun rises, we begin our journey.
As soon as the sun will rise, we begin our journey.
As soon as the sun rises, we will begin our journey.
As soon as the sun rose, we will begin our journey.

questions.explanation: После "as soon as" не используется Future Simple, только Present Simple.

questions.prompt: В каком предложении правильно использовано "as soon as"?

choices.text: As soon as they arrive, they will start the meeting.
As soon as they will arrive, they start the meeting.
As soon as they arrived, they will start the meeting.
As soon as they arrive, they start the meeting.

questions.explanation: В придаточном предложении Present Simple, в главном — Future Simple.

choices.text: As soon as I hear the news, I'll call you.
As soon as I will hear the news, I call you.
As soon as I heard the news, I'll call you.
As soon as I hear the news, I call you.

questions.explanation: Главное предложение должно быть Future Simple, а не Present Simple.

questions.prompt: Выберите правильный вариант для предложения: "We'll leave ________."

choices.text: as soon as the rain will stop
as soon as the rain stops
as soon as the rain stopped
as soon as the rain is stopping

questions.explanation: В придаточном предложении используется Present Simple, а не Future Simple.

choices.text: As soon as the movie ends, we'll go home.
As soon as the movie will end, we go home.
As soon as the movie ended, we'll go home.
As soon as the movie ends, we go home.

questions.explanation: Главное предложение должно быть Future Simple, а не Present Simple.

questions.prompt: В каком случае "as soon as" используется правильно?

choices.text: As soon as she will be ready, we start.
As soon as she is ready, we start.
As soon as she is ready, we'll start.
As soon as she was ready, we'll start.

questions.explanation: В придаточном Present Simple, в главном — Future Simple.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение не соответствует правилу "as soon as"?

choices.text: As soon as you understand the problem, you can solve it.
As soon as you will understand the problem, you can solve it.
As soon as you understood the problem, you can solve it.
As soon as you understand the problem, you will solve it.

questions.explanation: После "as soon as" не используется Future Simple, только Present Simple.

choices.text: As soon as you press the button, the machine will turn on.
As soon as you will press the button, the machine turns on.
As soon as you pressed the button, the machine turns on.
As soon as you press the button, the machine turns on.

questions.explanation: В придаточном Present Simple, в главном — Future Simple.
